frothy install — send the project's library source to a device under install-library mode

Install sends the project's library source to a connected device under install-library mode, persisting the library tier on the board. Use it after build to deliver the library code your project depends on to the device. The user tier is untouched.

Examples:
  frothy install --port /dev/cu.usbserial-0001
      send the project's library source to the board on that port

Flags:
  -port string
    	serial port, for example /dev/cu.usbserial-0001
  -project string
    	project directory containing frothy.toml (default ".")
